name: openclaw 2026.3.13
body:
## Changes
- Make email, webhook, and tasks data sources handle more tool variations.
- Make sql tool output handle table structures.
- Load slack comment_block objects as .text.
- Add Slack data source conversation name.
- Make airbyte OCR handle FileObject content.
- Add sec scrape workflow to web scraper.
- Deduplicate warnings in CLI.
- Add `custom_node` (code component) support in workflow.

## Fixes
- Fix pagerduty schedule timezone conversion.
- Fix max results issue in data sources.
- Fix datetime naive conversion in dumps to db.
